compiled_state.title: Write RED test: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT researchFindings schema structural boundary
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Story
eaa2-ca1c — PREPLANNING_CONTEXT research compounding across pipeline

## Goal
Write a failing (RED) structural boundary test for the researchFindings array + schema_version extension to PREPLANNING_CONTEXT in preplanning SKILL.md, before those additions are made.

## Test File
tests/skills/test-preplanning-research-findings-schema.sh

## Test Cases (≥3 required)
1. **test_preplanning_research_findings_array_mentioned** — preplanning SKILL.md mentions `researchFindings` array in the PREPLANNING_CONTEXT section
2. **test_preplanning_schema_version_field** — preplanning SKILL.md mentions `schema_version` field in PREPLANNING_CONTEXT
3. **test_preplanning_skip_verified_capability** — preplanning SKILL.md describes skipping WebSearch for `verified` entries (structural boundary: "verified" + "skip" mentioned in research phase section)
4. **test_preplanning_research_findings_merge** — preplanning SKILL.md describes reading and merging `RESEARCH_FINDINGS:` ticket comments during Step 5a

## Acceptance Criteria
- Test file exists and is executable
- All test cases FAIL before implementation (RED)
- All test cases PASS after implementation (GREEN)
- Follows behavioral-testing-standard.md Rule 5

## .test-index
After creating this file, add entry to .test-index:
  plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md → tests/skills/test-preplanning-research-findings-schema.sh [test_preplanning_research_findings_array_mentioned]

## Files to Modify
- tests/skills/test-preplanning-research-findings-schema.sh (CREATE)
- .test-index (UPDATE — add RED marker for preplanning/SKILL.md)
